programme.title: E2 - A Mother's Lump
programme.desc: Angela has a huge growth on the back of her neck that she fears will ruin her daughter's wedding. Loretta is terrified that her oozing skin condition will get in the way of making her movie.

programme.title: E2 - A Mother's Lump

programme.title: E16 - Crab Nachos And Steak Tacos
programme.desc: Surf and turf is a great combination, but why not make it even better by serving it with tacos? Rachael shows us how to make the ultimate date-night combo of crab nachos and steak tacos.

programme.title: E3 - Turk-Ish Leek Burgers & Peach Crumb Bars
programme.desc: Jake is inspired by two dishes he learned from his mother-in-law and grandmother. The first is a Turkish leek burger. For dessert, it's a variation of his grandmother's cake with peach crumb bars.

programme.title: E84 - Tampa: Wall Street
programme.desc: An overextended Dolmar and his team take on a botched flip. But when delays plague the timeline, he recruits his wife Keisha to help manage the project and sees dollar signs as local house prices soar.

programme.title: Aha!
programme.desc: An informative and educational program that promises to share interesting facts and trivia about a wide range of topics to the viewers.

programme.title: Taste Buddies
programme.desc: Solenn and Gil serve up new experiences through mouth-watering food features, trips to the most happening places and explorations on the different facets of Filipino modern living.

programme.title: Farm To Table
programme.desc: Chef JR gives our viewers a peek into the fascinating process of food preparation -- from picking and harvesting fresh ingredients to cooking and plating a delicious dish.

programme.title: Pinas Sarap
programme.desc: A food and travel program that aims to discover the origins of our favorite Pinoy cuisines by traveling to various places in the country.

programme.title: Turbo Zone
programme.desc: A young, dynamic, fresh take motoring show in the Philippines that allows us to satiate our appetite for cars, motoring gadgets and automotive market trends.

programme.title: E17 - Andy And The Smooth Coated Otters
programme.desc: Andy, Jen and Scout jet off in the Explorer to Singapore on a global adventure to help guide a smooth-coated otter family back to the safety of a nearby river.

programme.title: E6 - The Why Badge
programme.desc: Why do my feet hurt?', Tag asks Duggee. While Duggee has a think, he tells them 'why' is a great question, and the Squirrels are quick to follow up.

programme.title: E22 - Ping Pong Penguins
programme.desc: What's that bouncy, pingy, whacking sound? It's the Penguins playing ping-pong!

programme.title: E23 - Stick Together
programme.desc: Have you seen Duggee? Help the Squirrels search for him, but they need to stick together!

programme.title: E110 - Rain
programme.desc: A cloud appears in Teletubbyland and it rains. Tinky Winky, Dipsy, Laa-Laa and Po watch the flowers bloom. Another cloud appears and it rains pink, Tubby Custard!

programme.title: E4 - Best Friend Song
programme.desc: Join the dance party with the Teletubbies! Tinky Winky, Dipsy, Laa-Laa and Po dance and sing the Best Friend Song with their school friends.

programme.title: E39 - Exercise
programme.desc: Dad thinks he needs to do some exercise, but Bingo pretends to be Boss Bluey's new employee in the middle of Dad's backyard workout.

programme.title: E42 - Show And Tell
programme.desc: Bluey wants to know why Dad's always bossing her around.

programme.title: E16 - Rangers Of The Rails
programme.desc: A bit bored by her surroundings, Emily longs to go on a fun adventure and experience something new and exciting. It's not long before her wish is granted.

programme.title: E3 - Cheese Moon
programme.desc: It's a space race as Supertato helps Carrot fly her baguette rocket to be the first Veggie on the Cheese Moon but half way there Evil Pea crashes into them making them crash land.

programme.title: E4 - Treasure In The Plant Aisle
programme.desc: In the perilous plant aisle Supertato and Evil Pea team up to find treasure as they have half a map each, but she tricks him and steals the map to find the treasure for herself.

programme.title: E16 - The Medicine Badge
programme.desc: Duggee's not very well, he's lost his voice. The Squirrels want to make him feel better. Duggee tries to tell them that he needs some water but the Squirrels don't quite understand, so they ask all the other animals for advice. Does anyone have the answer?

programme.title: E17 - The Camping Badge
programme.desc: Duggee and the squirrels are going camping and they hear a scary noise outside the tent!

programme.title: E19 - The River Badge
programme.desc: Duggee has a package that needs delivering right at the other end of the river, and a long way from the clubhouse. It looks like the squirrels are going to have a day out on the boat. Good job Duggee has his River badge!

programme.title: E22 - Ping Pong Penguins
programme.desc: What's that bouncy, pingy, whacking sound? It's the Penguins playing ping-pong!

programme.title: The Secrets Of Hotel 88
programme.desc: It tells the story of three estranged brothers who discovered that they are part of the same family. And while they will inherit a hotel, they will also inherit its secrets. However, a rival family claims their rights on the land where the hotel stands, and a fight to take the hotel ensues, and the secrets that are kept starts to get uncovered.

News Talk: News Talk is packed with subjective, authoritative and unique facts, treating the viewer to a detailed, incisive and informative news feature.

programme.title: E485
programme.desc: DREAMSCAPES, ARCHITECTURAL WONDERS: From simple residential cottage, impressive royal mansion to magnificent skyscraper, behind those bricks and steel structure, it is the historical and cultural designs that make them immortal. This program shows the great architectures and how they inspire us in various ways.

programme.title: E391
programme.desc: PHOENIX SUPER DOCTORS: Phoenix Super Doctors is a cross-media health science popularization program. It precisely targets core audiences aged 25-65, including business leaders, middle-class, white-collar workers and highly educated individuals. Centered on trending health topics, the program integrates the wisdom of traditional Chinese medicine with cutting-edge achievements in modern Western medicine. Featuring a top-tier expert team led by academicians, it delivers an immersive, virtual-real blended audiovisual experience through XR virtual scenarios and AI-powered intelligent graphics.

programme.title: E230
programme.desc: CHINA INSIGHT: China Insight is a captivating series that offers foreign hosts the opportunity to travel and observe the dynamic scenes of China's contemporary society. The series aims to showcase the significant transformations taking place in various aspects such as politics, economy, technology, and culture.

programme.title: E634

Find out what's going on in the world of economy, politics, culture, sport, medicine, ecology. Focus has it all covered for you. Short videos contain facts, interviews with real people, numbers, statistics, everything you need to be aware of recent events in the world and of what is actually going on.

programme.title: E22 - 夢會實現 愛會到來
programme.desc: 《非誠勿擾》回歸經典規則。男嘉賓登場後，將通過「愛之請回答」「愛之再判斷」「愛之終決選」三個環節與24位女嘉賓互相了解，還有根據大數據匹配的「智推女生」參與最終決選。陳銘、黃瀾加盟「非誠合夥人」，以全新視角解讀愛情。

programme.title: E7 - 周柯宇常華森賽車一戰封神
programme.desc: 由吳彥祖擔任「風華投資人」，集結井朧、代旭、沙一汀、周柯宇、常華森、董思成、謝依霖等常駐嘉賓，在杭州西湖邊的青春潮飲生活店，共同完成15天的運營任務，探索興趣社交的潮流生活方式。

programme.title: E7 - 周柯宇常華森賽車一戰封神
programme.desc: 由吳彥祖擔任「風華投資人」，集結井朧、代旭、沙一汀、周柯宇、常華森、董思成、謝依霖等常駐嘉賓，在杭州西湖邊的青春潮飲生活店，共同完成15天的運營任務，探索興趣社交的潮流生活方式。

programme.title: E11 - 大張偉Amber音樂盛典放大招
programme.desc: 在音樂主題上再度突破，以「一路為伍，向生綻放」為主題，甄選了貼近生活的歌曲和作品，用歌聲傳遞正能量；邀請了A-Lin、大張偉、庾澄慶、馬嘉祺、光良、蘇慧玲、任賢齊、陳卓璇、曾比特、白舉綱、吳莫愁等老、中、青三代歌手，在全新升級的「盲選配對」模式中組合獻唱，在代際傳承、時代交融中突破自我，打造一場最溫暖、最動人的音樂盛宴。

programme.title: E7 - 周柯宇常華森賽車一戰封神
programme.desc: 由吳彥祖擔任「風華投資人」，集結井朧、代旭、沙一汀、周柯宇、常華森、董思成、謝依霖等常駐嘉賓，在杭州西湖邊的青春潮飲生活店，共同完成15天的運營任務，探索興趣社交的潮流生活方式。

programme.title: E22 - 夢會實現 愛會到來
programme.desc: 《非誠勿擾》回歸經典規則。男嘉賓登場後，將通過「愛之請回答」「愛之再判斷」「愛之終決選」三個環節與24位女嘉賓互相了解，還有根據大數據匹配的「智推女生」參與最終決選。陳銘、黃瀾加盟「非誠合夥人」，以全新視角解讀愛情。

programme.title: Displaced On The Island Of Java - A Village Sinking Into The Sea
programme.desc: In 2014, the first flood caught the sleeping residents of the Javanese village off guard. Since then, rising sea tides have kept engulfing the village. The water is still rising - up to 15 centimeters in a year.

programme.title: Understand The World, One Story At A Time
programme.desc: Our deep dive format explains the stories that matter - with clarity, context and journalistic rigor. Each segment goes beyond the headlines to uncover what's driving key developments around the world, featuring sharp analysis, expert voices and exclusive on the ground insights from where events are unfolding.

programme.title: Does The Internet Have An Expiration Date?
programme.desc: Could quantum computers break the internet as we know it? Meta's AI is checking your age, Nvidia wants your PC to think for you, and AI is even entering religion. But at what cost?

programme.title: From Competition To Combat: Athletes In The Baltic States Prepare For Defen
programme.desc: In the Baltic states, athletes are preparing for more than just competition. As Russia's war in Ukraine reshapes Europe's security landscape, athletes in Latvia, Lithuania and Estonia balance elite training with military service. From conscription to volunteer defense leagues, their skills are increasingly tied to national defense, blurring the line between being an athlete and a soldier.

programme.title: And I Hate You So
programme.desc: Zhang hosts a top radio program that offers advice regarding love affairs. He starts a love-war relationship with Wu, a columnist, when she hears him gossiping on her love life!

programme.title: Son On The Run
programme.desc: Hung is a stuntman living with his troublesome father, Kwun. Five years ago, he deeply fell in love with May. Yet May's father strongly objected their relations and separated them trickily, with the help of Kwun. One day, May come backs - but with her six-year-old son, Sam. He begins to get back what he loses five years ago. May actually been badly ill before she comes back Hong Kong. Her only wish before die is to bring Sam back to Hung. After May has died, May's father insists to keep Sam by his sides. Hung tries his best to get back Sam. In order to earn more money, he does a very dangerous stunt. At last, he is injured...

programme.title: 3 Days Of A Blind Girl
programme.desc: Heung is temporarily blinded by an accident. While her doctor husband leaves Hong Kong for a meeting, an uninvited man arrives at their house. The man teases and tortures Heung, claiming that he is coming to avenge his wife...

programme.title: Girls Without Tomorrow
programme.desc: A polyphonous and surprisingly complex portrayal of the lives of Hong Kong prostitutes, told through the eyes of several women of varying class and social standing whose lives are affected-directly and indirectly-by the world's oldest profession.

programme.title: E2 - In Flight Meals
programme.desc: Go hunting with flyers who excel at making mid-air catches. Watch the metamorphosis of the acrobatic emperor dragonfly, admire the barn owl’s stealthy approach to prey, and catch a wandering salamander’s death-defying leap into the abyss.

programme.title: E1 - Australia
programme.desc: Scan the Australian skies, which regularly deliver some of the world’s most volatile weather. Await cooling monsoon rains, watch lightning ignite vast wildfires, and marvel at the ingenious adaptations that help wildlife deal with these extremes.

programme.title: E2 - North America
programme.desc: Experience the powerful, colourful phenomena that swirl across the heavens in North America. Watch polar bears search for food under the aurora borealis, map the frigid path of a polar vortex, and elude violent tornadoes with a prairie dog family.

programme.desc: The venue for Pinoys to strut and display their unique talents for all the world to see. Led by a powerhouse cast of popular celebrities - Vhong Navarro, Anne Curtis, Ogie Alcasid, Karylle, Jhong Hilario and Vice Ganda to name a few.

programme.title: Sigabo[Live]
programme.desc: The series explores the stark contrast in the lives of two individuals: Gabo (Martin), a spunky, street-smart man from a vibrant, humble community, and Samantha (Montes), a tough, fearless law enforcer from a highly affluent and privileged background. It blends action, romance, and comedy as their paths cross and their different worlds collide.

programme.title: Blood Vs. Duty[Live]
programme.desc: Two brothers separated in a maritime tragedy grow up on opposite sides of the law - one a dedicated Intelligence Officer, the other fiercely protective of the Tausug family that raised him. When a corruption case pits them against each other, their long-buried secret threatens to ignite a war between blood and loyalty.

programme.title: The Secrets Of Hotel 88[Live]
programme.desc: Two estranged families reunite at the reopening of Hotel 88, until the former bestfriends behind it are found dead. Forced to share the inheritance, their children uncover buried secrets and the truth behind their father's mysterious deaths.

E3 - A Big Ocean Clean Up Day!
programme.desc: Join the Shark Family as they work hard to keep the sea clean! It's a busy day with so much rubbish on the seabed. Stanley Shark becomes his heroic alter-ego, Super Shark, to show everyone how to clean up & recycle properly! The Sharksons show their creativity by using recycled materials to build an amazing underwater ball pit & slide. Plus, see them use teamwork to operate little digger trucks & even fix a broken bus wheel using a sunken bin lid!

programme.title: E2 - Sweet Dreams & Bedtime Songs!
programme.desc: Get ready for sweet dreams & bedtime songs! Mummy helps Mia begin her nighttime routine by tucking her toys into cozy spaces. Then, they try out some super simple & calming animal-related yoga poses to help Mia have a restful sleep. Daddy also shows Mia that routines can be fun with his 'brush your teeth dance'! Finally, Mummy & Daddy play a beautiful lullaby on their guitars to help soothe the kids to sleep under the twinkling stars.

programme.title: E2 - The Ultimate Clubhouse Game Day
programme.desc: Get ready for the ultimate clubhouse game day with JJ & his friends! The competition heats up as JJ & Wally compete in an adrenaline-pumping go-kart race full of fun tricks & obstacles. Then, it's time for a silly game of hide-and-seek, where Boba finds the most clever hiding places! The games continue with a balloon boat race, a round of Duck Duck Goose & a clean-up dance party after the clubhouse gets messy. It's a day packed with fun & friendly competition!

programme.title: E1 - Orphle & Winston's Worst Ideas Ever!
programme.desc: Get ready for chaos with Orphle & Winston's worst ideas ever! First, Doubler accidentally multiplies monster truck Orphle, & all the new Orphles team up to cause trouble in Pet Port! Then, Winston wants to be turned into a big cat, but a Magic Pet accidentally turns him into a big rat instead, forcing Mila & Morphle to find him. The bad ideas continue as the two villains try to cheat to win a game of Capture the Flag!

programme.title: E3 - Races, Games & Helping Friends!
programme.desc: Join the crew for some fun competitions & a day of helping friends! First, the friends compete in a fun obstacle course to see who can finish the race the fastest & lift the special trophy! Then, just as the crew is ready to demolish an old building, a cute cat hops inside, & the team must rescue the kitten before finishing the job. The helping continues as they save another kitten from a dangerous situation & Dazey must think fast to save Mrs. Skip from a runaway river barge!

programme.title: E3 - A Big Ocean Clean Up Day!
programme.desc: Join the Shark Family as they work hard to keep the sea clean! It's a busy day with so much rubbish on the seabed. Stanley Shark becomes his heroic alter-ego, Super Shark, to show everyone how to clean up & recycle properly! The Sharksons show their creativity by using recycled materials to build an amazing underwater ball pit & slide. Plus, see them use teamwork to operate little digger trucks & even fix a broken bus wheel using a sunken bin lid!

programme.title: E1 - Underwater Problems & Clever Fixes
programme.desc: The Sharksons are using their brains for some clever underwater fixes! When all the contents of Tucker's bag fall out from a hole in his backpack, Stanley & Grub help him fix it so he can get to school. Then, when Grub can't get to sleep because she's afraid of the dark, Stanley has a clever idea to make a 'star' night light from a glove that floated down. From turning veggies into a fun game to sorting recycling, there's always a clever fix!

programme.title: E2 - What Will JJ Learn Today?
programme.desc: What will JJ learn today? Join him for a week of fun as he learns why each day is special. Then, celebrate Valentine's Day with the Melon Patch kids as they show they care with gifts & kind words. The learning continues as Bella helps teach the class the ASL alphabet & Daniela teaches the differences between the English & Spanish ABCs! From visiting a petting zoo to learning about recycling, there's a new lesson every day!

programme.title: E5 - Retro Camping
programme.desc: In Calvados, Laurent shares a bit of the daily life of retro campers. From the vehicle to the dishes, everything is vintage! Focus on the Citroen Dyane, overshadowed by the 2 CV, the Renault 9 and a BMW queen of tuning.

programme.title: E4 - Split Pea Veloute, Chickpea Gnocchi
programme.desc: Accompanied by Brigitte Rosset, Annick Jeanmairet offers a coconut curry split pea veloute and chickpea gnocchi. Discovery of the day: cold-pressed fruit juices from Valais.

programme.title: E1 - Terroirs Of Excellence In The Provencal Alps
programme.desc: From Saint-Paul-de-Vence to the Roya Valley, in the hinterland of Nice, enthusiasts are fighting to promote their territory. By reviving an old perfume house or creating a high-end spirit with small spelt, these artisans are committed to preserving their precious heritage.

programme.title: E391 - Carnival Cash Out
programme.desc: Mike and Jersey go hog wild for a four-generation carny collection complete with carousel horses, toy tanks, and bumper cars. Down the road in New Hampshire, the guys head to Roger's analogue laboratory.

programme.title: E1 - Mind Game Masters
programme.desc: Before World War II, board games were mostly simple, but postwar peace and prosperity revealed a demand for more challenging pastimes. After decades of struggle, three different innovators break the mould.

programme.title: E18 - The Legend Of Bigfoot
programme.desc: Thousands of people swear they've encountered this legendary North American creature, but Bigfoot has never been officially identified. As evidence continues to mount, the mystery endures.

programme.title: E5 - Weapons
programme.desc: From ancient war machines to devastating weapons of mass destruction, these are the innovations that changed warfare and rank among history's deadliest.

programme.title: Na Umra Ki Seema Ho
programme.desc: Vidhi, a young woman, falls in love with Devratha, a middle-aged tycoon. Together they embark on a journey of love, and acceptance beyond the barrier of age.

programme.title: Shaurya Aur Anokhi Ki Kahani
programme.desc: Shaurya, a male chauvinist who believes that every girl's future belongs in the kitchen, is in for a surprise when he crosses paths with Anokhi, a hardworking girl.

programme.title: Saraswati Chandra
programme.desc: Saraswati Chandra calls off his marriage with Kumud, eventually leading to her being married off to a drunkard. Years later, Kumud, now a widow, comes face-to-face with Saraswati.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE delivers the latest from Japan, Asia, and the rest of the world. While covering wide network of correspondents breaking news and developing stories, offering a perspective from this corner of the globe, a team of trusted anchors ties it all together to give you a picture of what's happening now, and what's ahead.

programme.title: Echappees Belles S19
programme.desc: Sophie Jovillard, Jerome Pitorin, Ismael Khelifa and Tiga embark the traveller that lies within each of us for a fabulous breath of fresh air! Ninety minutes filled with new horizons and fascinating encounters around the world, four different ways of seeing a city, a region, a country...

programme.title: Si On Lisait A Voix Haute 2025:2025
programme.desc: There were over 100,000 hopefuls, and now there are 9 finalists, all middle and upper school pupils aged between 10 and 18. In front of a panel of celebrity judges, they will perform a compulsory text, discovered the day before, and will be judged on four main criteria: articulation, rhythm, appropriateness of tone and ability to move the audience.

E5
programme.desc: 《誰是兇手》講述了一起發生在海舟市的連環兇案，在真相塵封了十七年之後，與這宗懸案有著千絲萬縷聯繫的人們，在各自不可告人的秘密中，一起等待真相浮出水面的故事。 2001年寒冬，海舟市印刷廠家屬院發生了一起命案。新人刑警冷小兵和師兄接到一起報案奔赴現場，卻意外面對海舟市連環殺人案的兇手。冷小兵膽怯不敢開槍，兇手從現場逃走並殺害了師兄李嵐。現場另一名目擊證人是躲在床下的夏木。為繼續留在警隊冷小兵隱瞞了不敢開槍的事，夏木也沒有揭穿他。至此兇手藏匿起來，海舟案懸而未決。十七年後，夏木來到警隊實習，以冷小兵不敢開槍的事作為把柄，要挾他和自己一起查案。而伴随着神秘的心理医生沈雨的出现，一起几乎与十七年前一模一样的案子再次发生，而沈雨身上一个又一个疑团频频出现，凶手究竟是谁？

programme.title: E17
programme.desc: 故事講述了周筱風（趙又廷 飾）、方筱然（毛曉彤 飾）和林逸（金世佳 飾）三位心臟科醫生機緣巧合下，在東立醫院心臟中心相遇。三人因專業背景、職業理念不同而產生摩擦碰撞，隨後在治病救人的過程中逐漸磨合達成默契，最終在生命戰場並肩作戰的故事。

programme.title: Razor
programme.desc: CGTN's brand new science and technology show, covering cutting edge developments from all over the world. RAZOR will show you the world's most powerful laser and the world's smallest anti-cancer treatment. It will take you from the weird world of quantum computing to the boundaries of the cosmos. An international team of reporters will follow the guidance of Occam's Razor - the principle that the simplest explanation is the best one. RAZOR will show that we are already ''living in the future'!

programme.title: Inheritors
programme.desc: Inheritors is a multi-media product from CGTN that shines a light on China's rich Intangible Cultural Heritage. Each 30-minute TV edition is hosted by a long-term expatriate in China who has a unique understanding of the country's culture. He or she will introduce viewers to people who are dedicating their lives to its protection, inheritance, innovation, development and promotion.

programme.title: Inheritors
programme.desc: Inheritors is a multi-media product from CGTN that shines a light on China's rich Intangible Cultural Heritage. Each 30-minute TV edition is hosted by a long-term expatriate in China who has a unique understanding of the country's culture. He or she will introduce viewers to people who are dedicating their lives to its protection, inheritance, innovation, development and promotion.

E330
programme.desc: Two-day road trip to the beautiful spots in all the corners of Korea! Instead of fancy studio, this on-the-road reality show takes place in the rural sides. While over 10 million Koreans travel abroad each year, the '2 Days and 1 Night' casts travel around Korea - to the mountains, farms, fishing villages, islands - where you can meet the welcoming smiles of our neighbors and the beautiful nature that cleanse our eyes.

programme.title: The Hill of Secrets
programme.desc: Sensitive 12-year-old Myung-eun (Moon Seung-a) is embarrassed of her working-class family and constantly lies to keep her true family situation a secret. When she writes, though, she is not constrained by reality. Pouring herself into essays, Myung-eun takes pride in constructing a different world of her own. However, the candid writings of a new student shake her sense of self, and prompt Myung-eun to better understand her family. Reminiscent of acclaimed coming-of-age Korean indies like The World of Us and House of Hummingbird, writer-director Lee Ji-eun's understated debut feature excels in its perceptive depiction of the emotions and experiences of a child trying to find her place in the world.

programme.title: E5
programme.desc: 鷹野爪子是一名外表聰明幹練、聲音沉穩的女子。她充滿自信，同時謙遜有禮，充滿王牌風範。雖然看似能幹，但其實非常無能。另一方面，鷹野的同期鶸田道人則是和爪子完全相反，是個外表看似無能實則十分能幹的可憐上班族。這樣的他，卻被迫成為在公司內部終日無所事事的鷹野的搭檔，開始了極其不幸的職場生活。

programme.title: E8
programme.desc: 以日本尚未制度化的臥底誘捕調查為主題，森川葵在劇中飾演的是警視廳新設立小隊「STINGERS（臥底搜查檢證室）」的隊長——二階堂民子。她是警察廳的菁英份子，曾赴美接受 FBI 的正統「Sting Operation（臥底行動）」訓練，身為頂尖精英警視歸國。擅長偽裝、即興演技、心理操控與陷阱設計，是臥底搜查的專家。說話簡潔、指示神秘，經常以出人意表的行動讓部下摸不著頭緒，卻又總能在不知不覺間讓一切線索串連起來。這位充滿謎團的領導者，將帶領 STINGERS 成功解決各種案件。

programme.title: E5
programme.desc: 鷹野爪子是一名外表聰明幹練、聲音沉穩的女子。她充滿自信，同時謙遜有禮，充滿王牌風範。雖然看似能幹，但其實非常無能。另一方面，鷹野的同期鶸田道人則是和爪子完全相反，是個外表看似無能實則十分能幹的可憐上班族。這樣的他，卻被迫成為在公司內部終日無所事事的鷹野的搭檔，開始了極其不幸的職場生活。

programme.title: E8
programme.desc: 故事以夏日的相遇為主題，在海邊一起出生及長大的「海邊的灰姑娘」女子三人組與在東京就讀一流大學的優等生男子們相識的故事。在盛夏的海邊出現命運般的相遇，各人一起努力跨越看不見的差異，帶著複雜交錯的感情，相互交織想法一起成長。

programme.desc: Tara Grinstead's sudden disappearance goes unexplained for 11 years until a surprising statement to law enforcement from Bo Dukes, a former student, names his friend and former classmate as her killer.

programme.desc: For nearly a year, investigators from multiple law enforcement agencies work tirelessly to uncover a twisted tale of secrets and lies that led to murder.

programme.title: E3 - Refusal To Comply
programme.desc: Summer around the Lake of the Ozarks heats up as Corporal Stephen Riner tries to stop a curious case of road rage. K9 officer Corporal Caleb Harvey and Donzi search a vehicle they believe has narcotics.

programme.desc: When a young woman tries to end a controlling relationship, her former boyfriend carries out a brazen, public attack—forcing a community to confront the deadly consequences of jealousy and obsession.

E1 - Beauty and the Reef
programme.desc: This is a crucial documentary told by those who have lived and breathed every facet of this reef and been the advocates long before people understood the changes.. The vision of 10,000 dives through the producer half of these on the Great Barrier reef to provide the avenue of understanding of change. The knowledge of one of the worlds leading marine biologist who has spent his life in the water and advised governments on upcoming changes is world class.. Lin Sutherland has published hundreds of article on the marine environment, has been a photographer, videographer and passionate advocate who has always understood the journey of the Great barrier reef, few people have the insight into this ecosystem like her. This will be a film of a lifetime.

programme.title: E2 - Highlight 2
programme.desc: An overturned Gas tanker full of highly flammable propane mean trouble for Crouch Recovery Incident Manager Steve. Working with the fire service he must all his experience to keep his team out of danger. Meanwhile with very little room to manoeuvre Lantern recovery op Steve must rescue a 44-ton artic stuck in a ditch on a busy five lane roundabout. And Lantern Recovery Op Sean has thought on his feet to break into an abandoned truck!

programme.title: E1 - Anthony Joshua
programme.desc: Adventurer Bear Grylls teaches the unified world heavyweight champion some alternative survival skills.

programme.title: E7 - Chase the Sun
programme.desc: Red Bull are known for their crazy events and have asked the team to do their latest version, Chase the Sun. A gruelling 24 hour team challenge to try and cover 350 km.

programme.title: E1 - Anthony Joshua
programme.desc: Adventurer Bear Grylls teaches the unified world heavyweight champion some alternative survival skills.

programme.title: E10 - Hard Truths of Conservation
programme.desc: When Dick Cabela founded “Cabela’s” in 1961, he was unaware it would become the foremost outfitting store in the world. So it’s only fitting that his son is on a quest to explore the Hard Truths of conservation. Join Dan Cabela, on this high-impact journey of discovery, as he uncovers some lesser-known facts about conservation. In particular, the role which hunting and the utilization of wildlife can play as a modern-day conservation tool.

programme.title: E9 - Whitetail Deer & Cranberries
programme.desc: Daniel and Avani harvest cranberries on a floating peat moss island, and they find some long range hunting in the dense Northeastern deer woods.

programme.title: E10 - Landlocked Salmon & Chaga
programme.desc: Daniel joins lifelong friends on a frozen lake to fish below the hard water for landlocked Atlantic salmon, and also searches high in the trees for a chaga mushroom.

Lin Sutherland has published hundreds of article on the marine environment, has been a photographer, videographer and passionate advocate who has always understood the journey of the Great barrier reef, few people have the insight into this ecosystem like her. This will be a film of a lifetime.
